name: vllm-project/vllm
note: High-throughput LLM serving engine; central reference for vLLM, PagedAttention, OpenAI-compatible local/cloud serving.

name: ggml-org/llama.cpp
note: Reference local/edge inference stack for GGUF models, CPU/GPU backends, quantized inference, and local agent deployment.

name: ollama/ollama
note: Popular local model runner and model packaging layer used by agent tools for offline/private inference.

name: sgl-project/sglang
note: Serving and programming framework for LLM/VLM applications with structured generation and high-performance runtime.

name: huggingface/text-generation-inference
note: Hugging Face production inference server for text generation models.

name: huggingface/transformers
note: Core model library underlying many local LLM, RAG, and serving stacks.

name: huggingface/accelerate
note: Runtime abstraction for distributed training/inference and device placement.

name: mlc-ai/mlc-llm
note: Compiler-oriented LLM deployment stack targeting local, browser, mobile, and heterogeneous devices.

name: EricLBuehler/mistral.rs
note: Rust inference engine for Mistral and compatible models.

name: mudler/LocalAI
note: Self-hosted OpenAI-compatible local AI server for LLMs and multimodal models.

name: oobabooga/text-generation-webui
note: Widely used local text generation UI and model experimentation surface.

name: lm-sys/FastChat
note: Chatbot serving and evaluation infrastructure associated with LMSYS arena lineage.

name: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM
note: NVIDIA optimized LLM inference stack for GPU deployment.

name: microsoft/BitNet
note: Efficient 1-bit LLM inference and model research implementation relevant to local LLM cost trends.

name: xorbitsai/inference
note: Xinference model serving stack for local and distributed LLM/embedding/reranker deployment.

name: run-llama/llama_index
note: Major RAG and agent framework focused on data ingestion, indexing, retrieval, and agent workflows.

name: langchain-ai/langchain
note: Core LLM application framework for RAG, tool calling, agents, and integrations.

name: deepset-ai/haystack
note: Pipeline-based RAG/search framework with components, document stores, generators, and evaluators.

name: microsoft/graphrag
note: Microsoft GraphRAG implementation for graph-structured retrieval and community/global-local query patterns.

name: HKUDS/LightRAG
note: Lightweight RAG/GraphRAG-style system focused on simple, fast, and graph-enhanced retrieval.

name: mem0ai/mem0
note: Agent memory layer for persistent personalized context across conversations and tools.

name: getzep/zep
note: Memory server and graph memory layer for AI agents.

name: stanford-oval/storm
note: Research and writing system that uses retrieval and multi-perspective synthesis.

name: weaviate/Verba
note: Reference RAG application for chat-with-docs workflows backed by Weaviate.

name: khoj-ai/khoj
note: Personal AI assistant with local/private knowledge search and RAG-oriented workflows.

name: QuivrHQ/quivr
note: Knowledge-base and second-brain style RAG application.

name: infiniflow/ragflow
note: Enterprise-oriented RAG platform focused on document parsing, retrieval, and workflow.

name: qdrant/qdrant
note: Vector search database used heavily in RAG stacks.

name: milvus-io/milvus
note: Distributed vector database for high-scale similarity search and RAG applications.

name: chroma-core/chroma
note: Developer-friendly embedding database used in many local RAG examples.

name: weaviate/weaviate
note: Vector database and search engine with hybrid search and module ecosystem.

name: lancedb/lancedb
note: Vector database built on Lance format for multimodal and local/cloud retrieval.

name: pgvector/pgvector
note: Postgres extension that makes vector search a database-native capability.

name: timescale/pgvectorscale
note: Timescale vector search extension for scalable ANN search in Postgres.

name: facebookresearch/faiss
note: Foundational vector similarity search library behind many retrieval systems.

name: typesense/typesense
note: Open-source search engine with keyword, semantic, hybrid, and vector search features for RAG-style retrieval.

name: explodinggradients/ragas
note: RAG evaluation framework for answer quality, faithfulness, context precision, and testset generation.

name: promptfoo/promptfoo
note: Prompt/model/app testing framework with CI, assertions, and red-team workflows.

name: confident-ai/deepeval
note: LLM evaluation and testing framework for RAG, agents, and LLM app quality gates.

name: truera/trulens
note: Evaluation and tracing framework for RAG and LLM applications.

name: Arize-ai/phoenix
note: Open-source AI observability and evaluation system with OpenInference tracing.

name: langfuse/langfuse
note: Open-source LLM observability, tracing, prompt management, and evaluation platform.

name: agenta-ai/agenta
note: LLMOps platform for prompt management, evaluation, and deployment workflows.

name: BerriAI/litellm
note: LLM gateway/proxy/router used to standardize provider calls, budgets, fallbacks, and telemetry.

name: stanfordnlp/dspy
note: Programming model for LM pipelines with optimizers, signatures, modules, retrieval, and evaluation loops.

name: pydantic/pydantic-ai
note: Typed Python agent framework emphasizing Pydantic models, structured outputs, tools, and testability.

name: guardrails-ai/guardrails
note: Validation and guardrail framework for LLM outputs and structured constraints.

name: humanlayer/humanlayer
note: Human approval and control layer for tool-using agents.

name: microsoft/promptflow
note: Flow-based LLM application development, evaluation, and deployment tooling.

name: openai/evals
note: OpenAI evaluation framework and registry; useful as historical and practical eval harness reference.
